This day, in Catalonia, the impossible is to re-make: after a heavy detection made in the first leg (4-0), FC Barcelona Terrasse Le Paris Saint-Germain in the Champions League on the score of 6-1, against all expectations, detecting all the forecasts. A crazy scenario that Real Madrid of Karim Benzema reached to impose three times at his opponents in 2022 to win his fourteenth Champions League.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: We dive into the fiercest rivalry in English football-Manchester United and Liverpool. As Liverpool draw level with United's record haul of top-flight titles, this is a story of history, pride, and the relentless pursuit of greatness. With insight from icons on both sides-Ian Rush, Lou Macari, Brian Kidd, Michael Owen, Phil Thompson, and new Liverpool boss Arne Slot, we unpack the moments that have defined generations, split families, and lit up the Premier League.

Back in his hometown, we meet the family, coaches and friends who helped shape the player and the person he's become. From humble beginnings to Premier League mainstay, Wood reflects on the pressures he's faced, the pride of leading his country, and the mindset that's driven him every step of the way.
